title: Graphql text artifacts appearing
excerpt: There is something odd happening with the  Graphql explorer. I tried this on chrome and safari and I keep getting random text artifacts appearing. Any ideas?

posts.author: kevinmarchese (Kevin marchese)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is something odd happening with the Graphql explorer. I tried this on chrome and safari and I keep getting random text artifacts appearing. Any ideas?

Screen Shot 2020-07-10 at 10.32.39 AM333×1292 43.2 KB

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s certainly strange. Can you share a screenshot of the console?

Also, are you accessing the GraphQL explorer via the Developers > Playground section in your account, or via the “try-it-yourself” webpage?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Experiencing the same here. This appears on monday.com and NOT on monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

Looks like the small down arrows are translated to \25BE in the try-it-yourself page

posts.author: kevinmarchese (Kevin marchese)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. I’ll just use the my-company one. I tried Brave browser and that was fine so it must be something with chrome and safari, a plugin perhaps.

posts.author: jimcullison (Jim Cullison)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same problem. It’s fine in the API Playground, but the Try it yourself version has the \25BE on some lines and at a 45 degree angle over in the documentation.
